method_description: Representative residential building-service bundle with current electricity, gas, liquid-fuel and biomass shares from official energy data.
evidence_summary: Baseline fuel shares are anchored to official Australian energy statistics; electrification direction is informed by AEMO and method electrification evidence.
derivation_method: Hybrid. 2025 incumbent coefficients are matched to official sector fuel shares. Prospective methods apply electrification and efficiency reductions consistent with Australian electrification studies, smoothed across milestone years.
review_notes: Baseline fuel shares reproduce official residential final-energy mix in 2023–24 when combined with service demand equal to 477.8 PJ_service_eq.

method_description: Residential services with strong heat-pump and appliance-efficiency uptake but some residual gas or biomass in the near term.
evidence_summary: Baseline fuel shares are anchored to official Australian energy statistics; electrification direction is informed by AEMO and method electrification evidence.
derivation_method: Hybrid. 2025 incumbent coefficients are matched to official sector fuel shares. Prospective methods apply electrification and efficiency reductions consistent with Australian electrification studies, smoothed across milestone years.
review_notes: Energy intensity falls because the method represents a more efficient service package; direct on-site emissions collapse as gas exits.

method_description: Highly electrified residential service bundle with widespread heat pumps and high shell/appliance efficiency.
evidence_summary: Baseline fuel shares are anchored to official Australian energy statistics; electrification direction is informed by AEMO and method electrification evidence.
derivation_method: Hybrid. 2025 incumbent coefficients are matched to official sector fuel shares. Prospective methods apply electrification and efficiency reductions consistent with Australian electrification studies, smoothed across milestone years.
review_notes: Represents the high-electrification/efficiency end of the residential service frontier. Useful as the near-zero direct-emissions building method.
